comments.body: @mheon Can you also backport https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/11614. This will fix issues on docs.podman.io and since readthedocs will use the actual tag we need to backport this as well.
I'll throw the docs commit on top because it doesn't need to be part of the tag

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *mheon*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/v3.4/OWNERS)~~ [mheon,rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
